title: Trump administration 'hoping to essentially do away with the rule of law and democracy in the US'
description: Oliver Farry welcomes Pierre Gervais, Professor of American Civilisation at Université Sorbonne Nouvelle. He describes the attacks on Iran beyond the prism of geopolitics: a veritable constitutional crisis made in America. He sees the unfolding war with Iran in the cadre of democratic resilience over military strategy. The short term will not be kind to Donald Trump as most Americans reject the war: Trump’s MAGA supporters are broadly isolationis

title: Iran warns European countries from joining the war
description: Iran’s Foreign Ministry spokesman has warned European countries against joining the ongoing war with Israel and the US.

title: NATO Chief welcomes Iran leader’s death
description: NATO Chief Mark Rutte says the world is “better off” with Iran’s Supreme Leader gone.

title: Video shows effects of debris falling on a building in Tel Aviv
description: New footage shows debris falling onto a residential building in Bnei Brak, east of Tel Aviv.

title: Israel Seizes Chance to Crush Hezbollah and Remake Mideast Amid Iran War
description: With the war against Iran underway, and the U.S. military as a powerful ally, the Israeli government is seizing its chance to move against other adversaries.

title: Live Updates: Trump Says Strikes Have Left a Leadership Vacuum in Iran
description: President Trump rejected suggestions that Israel forced his hand in attacking Iran, and said that it was unclear who would take over the country because likely candidates were dead. Global stock and oil markets are in turmoil.

title: Израиль изучает возможность открытия воздушного пространства на этой неделе
description: Израильская сторона рассматривает возможность постепенного открытия воздушного пространства уже на этой неделе, сообщает во вторник издание The Times of Israel.

title: Israel using cargo ships to bring back doctors stranded abroad by war, official says
description:
40 essential medical staff returned in two Zim journeys from Cyprus to Haifa so far, according to cargo firm; authorities say they'll bus Israelis into country from Egyptian border
The post Israel using cargo ships to bring back doctors stranded abroad by war, official says appeared first on The Times of Israel.

title: Hoping to pressure end to war, Iran aims fire at Arab neighbors. It hasn’t worked, yet
description:
Tehran is betting raising the costs of fighting for the stability-hungry region will lead to Trump backing off strikes, but the Gulf's defiance has foiled the strategy. Will it last?
The post Hoping to pressure end to war, Iran aims fire at Arab neighbors. It hasnt worked, yet appeared first on The Times of Israel.

title: After deadly missile impact, Beit Shemesh struggles to maintain Purim cheer
description:
As city reels from strike, most synagogues stay open for Purim against army's guidelines, but streets largely empty; Sunday's tragedy 'lowered the volume,' says rabbi's wife
The post After deadly missile impact, Beit Shemesh struggles to maintain Purim cheer appeared first on The Times of Israel.

title: Smaller volleys, more alerts: Attacking Israel anew, Iran shifts tack on missile barrages
description:
Tehran not sending large salvos as it did in June, though unclear if change is due to shortage, operational issues or new strategy; expert says interceptor stocks won't be challenged regardless
The post Smaller volleys, more alerts: Attacking Israel anew, Iran shifts tack on missile barrages appeared first on The Times of Israel.

title: Growing Iranian drone strikes drive slump in global shares, spike in crude prices
description:
Average price for a gallon of gasoline in the US jumps 11 cents overnight, while stocks of airlines continue to slide and Amazon sees decline after damage to sites in UAE, Bahrain
The post Growing Iranian drone strikes drive slump in global shares, spike in crude prices appeared first on The Times of Israel.

title: IDF hits Iran’s ‘leadership complex’ in Tehran; 12 Israelis hurt in Iran missile strikes
description:
Iranian retaliatory strikes damage US embassy in Riyadh and other sites in Gulf; satellite images show Natanz nuclear site hit by recent strikes, IAEA confirms
The post IDF hits Irans leadership complex in Tehran; 12 Israelis hurt in Iran missile strikes appeared first on The Times of Israel.

title: Huckabee advises US citizens in Israel to evacuate via Egypt, noting ‘limited options’
description:
After Washington tells citizens across the Middle East to 'DEPART NOW,' US ambassador suggests Taba as a departure point for citizens in Israel and recommends against Amman
The post Huckabee advises US citizens in Israel to evacuate via Egypt, noting limited options appeared first on The Times of Israel.
